# Slurry Density

**Summary**: The weight per unit volume of the cement slurry.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2012-amer|Amer, 2012]] measured slurry density using a pressurized density balance.

## Scientific Context

- [[2012-amer|Amer, 2012]] Critical for well control and ensuring the slurry can lift cuttings.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2012-amer|Amer, 2012]] Measured using a pressurized density balance.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The effect on cement slurry having 2.0% Nano silica was minimal regarding density. ([[2012-amer|Amer, 2012, p. 121]])
